'''Courataines''' were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoids]] from a [[Unidentified Courataine homeworld|homeworld]] with lower than standard [[Gravity/Legends|gravity]].<ref name="CSWE" /> Their bodies were wobbly-fleshed, resulting in them wearing [[Skeleton/Legends|exoskeletal]] travel suits when they traveled. On their [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]], they breathed a very thin [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]]; to simulate this offworld, they used [[Breath mask/Legends|respirators]]<ref name="HSR" /> built into their suits for comfort.<ref name="CSWE" /> At some point between [[2 BBY/Legends|2 BBY]] and [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]],<ref name="ERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[Star Wars: The Han Solo Adventures]]'', of which ''[[Han Solo's Revenge]]'' is part of, to between [[2 BBY/Legends|2 BBY]] and [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]].</ref> a number of Courataines were present on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Bonadan/Legends|Bonadan]] at the same time that the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] was there investigating an [[Slavery/Legends|enslavement ring]].<ref name="HSR" />

==Behind the scenes==
Courataines first appeared in ''[[Han Solo's Revenge]]'', a [[1979]] novel written by [[Brian Daley]] as the second volume of the ''[[Star Wars: The Han Solo Adventures]]'' trilogy.<ref name="HSR" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Han Solo's Revenge]]'' {{1st}}
